examples: Leonard says, 'but we made sure he got at least one official at-bat each season, so he'd be in the scorebook.
Any game that builds in true defensive mechanics to its combat system earns extra points in my scorebook.
Also, Christ the King accused a Nazareth staff member of erasing one of its players names from the scorebook after the 77-47 Nazareth victory.
Mercifully he appeared in the scorebook as 'I.
